query:
-- Update retailBundleMonthlyCost for retail offering customers
-- Sum only recurring bundle components (exclude installation one-time charges)
UPDATE customers c
JOIN (
  SELECT 
    contactName,
    SUM(lineAmount) as bundleCost
  FROM billing_items
  WHERE retailBundleComponent IN ('nbn', '4g_sim', 'sip_channels', 'support', 'voice_usage')
    AND category != 'one_time'
  GROUP BY contactName
) bi ON (c.xeroContactName = bi.contactName OR c.name = bi.contactName)
SET c.retailBundleMonthlyCost = bi.bundleCost
WHERE c.customerType = 'retail_offering';
